name: Primitive roles (Owner/Editor) assigned at project level
description: The project IAM policy grants the primitive role roles/owner or roles/editor to one or more members. Primitive roles are overly broad — Owner grants all permissions on all resources; Editor grants all write permissions. These roles violate the principle of least privilege and should be replaced with predefined or custom roles.
remediation: Replace roles/owner and roles/editor with predefined roles scoped to the minimum permissions required. Use IAM Recommender to right-size existing bindings. Grant roles at the resource level rather than the project level where possible.
